## Summary

Describe the issue in 1-2 sentences.

- OS:
- Cursor version:
- Model/provider used:

## What You Ran

- Prompt used:
- Intake style (`structured | free-form | auto-discovery fallback`):
- Any assumptions shown by the setup:

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened?

## Actual Behavior

What happened instead?

## Final Status Output

Paste the setup status sections:

- Applied
- Missing (needs external source)
- Pending user import
- Deferred by user
- Assumptions

## Logs / Screenshots (Optional)

Add relevant output or screenshots if available.
